title: Widdop and Co Petit Cheri Hanging Plaque - Happy Mother's Day From Bump
description: Wish the expecting mother in your life their very first HAPPY MOTHER'S DAY with this adorable circular hanging plaque. From Petit Cheri by CELEBRATIONS - vintage, rustic and utterly charming gifts for your little darling. This heart-melting little plaque features a soft pastel pink polka dot design on an off white background with a cute elephant and birdie decal. The message wishes a "happy Mother's Day, love from bump." Complete with a rustic hanging twine to make a beautiful ornamental keepsake. This nostalgic range of nursery products for baby boys and girls offers an eclectic mix of trendy bunting and bedroom decorations, soft and cuddly plush toys and little extras that any consumer looking for an on trend nursery will adore. More than just a memory. CELEBRATIONS is the one stop shop for any occasion.
